scope_note: Cert [482]: QA Witt Tower Crypto Return-Rank Crash Reversion. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) Efficient capital markets doi:10.2307/2325486 (random-walk baseline); Nakamoto S (2008) Bitcoin peer-to-peer cash system (asset source). Data: Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV via yfinance (BTC-USD 2015-01-01 to 2026-06-16, ETH-USD 2017-11-09 to 2026-06-16). Operator: full-sample return-rank bins floor(rank*27/N); b=bin[t], e=bin[t+1]; a=b+2*e (A2 derived); signal a<=6 (Singularity-type: both returns in bottom 7%); target=rets[t+2] (no look-ahead). BTC: n=126 excess=+0.847% perm_p=0.003 OOS_n=62 mean_oos=+0.557%. ETH: n=93 excess=+1.771% perm_p=0.0002 OOS_n=62 mean_oos=+1.434%. orbit_family on (b,e,m=27): Singularity-type pairs predict mean reversion after consecutive crash days. MOD=27. Parent: cert [461] equity price-rank a<=6.
